overview.description: AI-powered fault prediction, diagnostic assistance, and automated testing layer built on top of the ECU simulation core
overview.integrationPattern: Layered AI services consuming ECU telemetry and providing predictions/suggestions to diagnostic tools

faultPredictionEngine.role: Predict potential ECU faults based on telemetry patterns

architecture.input: Live ECU telemetry (DID values, timing, error rates)
architecture.output: Fault probability scores, predicted failure modes, recommended actions

features: Real-time anomaly detection on sensor streams
Pattern matching against historical fault signatures
Proactive DTC prediction before confirmation
Degradation trend analysis
Confidence-scored predictions

sources: Sensor value time-series from real vehicles
trainingData.generation: Automated scenario generation via fault injector
trainingData.syntheticData: Enhanced real data with simulated edge cases

modelTypes.name: LSTM Autoencoder
modelTypes.purpose: Unsupervised anomaly detection on sensor sequences
modelTypes.input: Window of last N sensor readings

modelTypes.name: Transformer-based Fault Classifier
modelTypes.purpose: Multi-class fault prediction from symptom patterns
modelTypes.input: Sequence of DIDs, DTCs, timing data

modelTypes.name: Graph Neural Network
modelTypes.purpose: Model ECU component relationships and fault propagation

architecture.knowledgeBase: Vector database of repair manuals, TSBs, known fixes
architecture.llmInterface: Local LLM for natural language explanations
architecture.output: Step-by-step diagnostic procedures with confidence scores

features: Natural language query interface for diagnostics
Retrieval of relevant TSBs and repair procedures
Next-step suggestions based on current symptoms
DTC interpretation with context
Probable cause ranking
Repair procedure generation
workflow: 1. Receive current ECU state (DTCs, DIDs, symptoms)
2. Query vector DB for similar historical cases
4. Generate ranked list of probable causes
6. Provide repair procedure with estimated difficulty/time

automatedTestGenerator.role: Generate comprehensive test scenarios from specifications
automatedTestGenerator.type: LLM-based test case generation + coverage optimization

architecture.specParser: Parse protocol specifications and OEM profiles
architecture.testGenerator: LLM to generate edge cases and test scenarios
architecture.scenarioOptimizer: Minimize test suite while maximizing coverage

features: Automatic test case generation from protocol specs
Edge case and boundary value test generation
Mutation testing (generate tests to break the system)
Coverage-guided test suite optimization
Regression test selection
Fuzzing test generation for protocol robustness

testTypes.name: Protocol Fuzzing
testTypes.description: Generate malformed messages to test error handling

testTypes.name: Boundary Testing
testTypes.description: Test edge cases for DID ranges, timing parameters

testTypes.name: State Space Exploration
testTypes.description: Generate tests to explore all session/security state combinations

testTypes.name: Regression Testing
testTypes.description: Select minimal test set covering changed components

telemetryAnomalyDetector.role: Real-time monitoring of ECU behavior during test execution

architecture.statisticalModels: Baseline behavior models per ECU profile

features: Real-time metric tracking (P1-P4 timing, error rates, DTC rates)
Baseline deviation detection
Correlation analysis across multiple ECUs
Performance regression detection
Trend analysis and forecasting

predictiveMaintenanceScheduler.role: Predict when test scenarios or ECU components need attention
features: Predict test flakiness based on historical patterns
Schedule maintenance of test hardware (HIL rigs)
Forecast ECU failure in production vehicles
Optimize test suite scheduling for CI/CD

ecuSimulator.purpose: Feed real-time data to AI models

trainingPhase: 1. Collect labeled historical data (DTCs, repairs, sensor logs)
2. Generate synthetic fault data via fault injector
inferencePhase: 1. Stream telemetry from running ECU simulator
3. Run inference on anomaly detection models
6. Log predictions and outcomes for model improvement

measures: GDPR compliance for EU vehicle data
Audit logging for all AI decisions
considerations: Vehicle data is sensitive personal data

deploymentStrategy.phase1: Offline model training and batch predictions

testGeneration.testEfficiency: Target: 10x reduction in test suite size

challenges: Need for domain expertise in feature engineering
Explainability of AI decisions for technicians
Integration complexity with legacy diagnostic tools
dependencies: Mature fault injection for training data generation
Stable core ECU simulator for reproducible testing
User feedback loop for continuous improvement

timeline.Q1_2027: Telemetry pipeline MVP + basic anomaly detection
timeline.Q2_2027: Diagnostic assistant beta in desktop UI
timeline.Q3_2027: Automated test generation for regression suite
timeline.Q4_2027: Full AI pipeline in production for pilot users
